tests: pytest tests/ -> 187 passed, 3 skipped (pre-existing Windows UnicodeDecodeError in test_gems::test_gem_upgrade_recipe_exists, test_item_bases_manual::{test_item_base_monarch, test_item_base_phase_blade}). Same 3 as previous runs. Not a regression.

questions_processed.question: Help with Monarch - trouble finding Monarch shield for Spirit
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Intent misclassified as magic_find_rule due to 'no magic find' phrase. Added negation-aware heuristic + item-farming keyword heuristic to intent classifier. Added Monarch farming strategy card. Extended strategy_cards retrieval to drop_rate/mechanics_query intents.

questions_processed.question: Why Fury Druid seems severely underrated compared to Zealot?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: No strategy cards for Fury Druid or Zealot. Added Fury Werewolf Druid build overview + Fury Druid vs Zealot comparison card (Grief hidden damage note, advantages of each).

questions_processed.question: Why does mercs level up slower in group games?
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Short keyword 'tc' (2 chars) caused false positive: 'matches' contains 'tc' substring, triggering treasure_class_rule. Added word-boundary matching for keywords <= 3 ASCII chars. Added merc XP mechanics strategy card.

review_instructions: Human review: (1) Word-boundary matching for short keywords (<=3 ASCII chars) in intent_classifier.py — check that existing short keywords like 'mf', 'gc', 'tc', 'cv', 'vs', 'bd' still work correctly as standalone words. (2) Strategy cards retrieval now enabled for drop_rate/mechanics_query intents — this may surface irrelevant cards when the question mentions farming areas tangentially. Monitor noise level. (3) New strategy cards (Monarch farming, Fury Druid, merc XP) contain community-sourced info — verify D2R accuracy.
